requiredRetainedData: all preregistered channel and momentum projections
chain batch trajectory measurement and RNG-stream identities

unresolvedConstructionDecisions.finding: The current Phase452/456 implementation accepts one isotropic torus extent n and constructs n^4. The A12/A13 protocol freezes temporal extents 16 and 32 but does not freeze whether the new acquisition is 4^3xT or T^4.
unresolvedConstructionDecisions.requiredResolution: Prospectively freeze spatial and temporal extents and provide a matching lattice implementation before pack bytes exist. Do not silently interpret temporal extent as isotropic extent.

unresolvedConstructionDecisions.finding: Four seeds are frozen, but an explicit portable RNG algorithm, state serialization, stream separation, and restart contract are not yet frozen for production acquisition.
unresolvedConstructionDecisions.requiredResolution: Name and version the RNG, seed expansion, state format, draw ordering, and independent-chain stream policy; bind their implementation hash.

unresolvedConstructionDecisions.finding: The current production path is the isotropic Phase452 CPU implementation. No anisotropic T16/T32 implementation or production-equivalent deterministic parity battery is committed.
unresolvedConstructionDecisions.requiredResolution: Implement the selected geometry on the CPU reference backend first and freeze reduced exact/parity controls before any acquisition. Hardware or backend changes require their own prospective compatibility ruling.

unresolvedConstructionDecisions.finding: The two-CPU-week ceiling is frozen, but runtime and storage forecasts are not meaningful until geometry, retained fields, and backend are fixed.
unresolvedConstructionDecisions.requiredResolution: Compute static memory/storage bounds and a noncontending reduced deterministic cost estimate, then freeze refusal thresholds.

constructionSequenceAfterAllBlockersClos: P0 revalidate every exact input binding and the accepted Phase480 derivative
P1 freeze geometry RNG backend chain topology storage schema and default configuration
P2 implement a deterministic pack generator that emits canonical manifest configuration schema and implementation hashes
P3 run reduced exact free-field Gaussian geometry gauge-invariance serialization restart and CPU-reference agreement batteries
P4 prove hash refusal with pack configuration implementation RNG topology and output-schema mutation injections
P5 run Phase481 without environment overrides and require a pack-ready no-sampling terminal
P6 run the mandatory incremental cascade and a full pass before any promotion-relevant citation
P7 request a separately recorded launch ruling against the exact committed pack fingerprint
P8 launch only through a tracked environment-clean harness with atomic checkpoints progress records and cost refusal
nonclaimBoundary: This plan concerns prospective workbench-relative lattice-unit calibration only. It creates no executable pack, launches no sampling, and supports no physical mass or GeV claim.
